---
title: "Instructor Only: Explore And Visualize"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath("../../../.."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

# Worked Reference

```{r}
prams <- readr::read_csv("data/real/prams_2011_selected.csv")

prams |>
  glimpse()

plot_data <- prams |>
  count(subgroup_cat, sort = TRUE) |>
  mutate(subgroup_cat = reorder(subgroup_cat, n))

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = subgroup_cat, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "PRAMS Rows By Subgroup Category",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Number of rows"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```

This checks the first workflow practice: data ingest, `glimpse()`, one count table, and one basic plot.
